# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch S3 Snapshot Repository Configuration
# This YAML is the payload for a PUT request to /_snapshot/my_s3_repository
type: s3
settings:
  bucket: your-s3-snapshot-bucket-name
  region: us-east-1
  base_path: /elasticsearch/snapshots/prod
  role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/es-snapshot-role # Optional: Use IAM role for authentication
  server_side_encryption: true
  compress: true
  chunk_size: 256mb # Optional: Defines the size of file chunks
  max_snapshots_for_base_path: 5000 # Optional: Limits the number of snapshots stored

---

# Elasticsearch File System Snapshot Repository Configuration
# This YAML is the payload for a PUT request to /_snapshot/my_fs_repository
# IMPORTANT: The 'location' path must be defined in elasticsearch.yml's 'path.repo' on all nodes.
type: fs
settings:
  location: /mnt/shared_backup_path/elasticsearch-snapshots
  compress: true
  chunk_size: 1gb # Optional: Defines the size of file chunks
  max_snapshots_for_base_path: 5000 # Optional: Limits the number of snapshots stored
  read_only: false # Optional: Set to true to make the repository read-only

---

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Creation Request
# This YAML is the payload for a PUT request to /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/daily_snapshot_20231027
# Replace 'my_s3_repository' with your chosen repository name.
# Replace 'daily_snapshot_20231027' with your desired snapshot name.
indices: "my_app_logs-*,audit_data-*" # Specify indices to backup, use "*" for all user-created indices
ignore_unavailable: true # Do not fail the snapshot if some indices are unavailable
include_global_state: true # Include cluster state (templates, settings, etc.)
partial: false # Do not allow partial snapshots (fail if primary shards are missing)
metadata: # Optional: Custom metadata for the snapshot
  taken_by: "automated-backup-system"
  reason: "daily-full-backup"
  environment: "production"

---

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Restoration Request
# This YAML is the payload for a POST request to /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/daily_snapshot_20231027/_restore
# Replace 'my_s3_repository' with your repository name.
# Replace 'daily_snapshot_20231027' with the name of the snapshot to restore.
indices: "my_app_logs-2023.10.26" # Specify specific indices to restore from the snapshot
ignore_unavailable: true # Ignore missing indices during restoration
include_global_state: false # Do not restore cluster global state (usually true only for full cluster recovery)
rename_pattern: "my_app_logs-(.+)" # Regex pattern to rename restored indices
rename_replacement: "restored_my_app_logs-$1" # Replacement pattern for renaming
include_aliases: false # Do not restore aliases along with indices
wait_for_completion: true # Wait for the restoration process to complete before returning
index_settings: # Optional: Overwrite specific index settings during restore
  "index.number_of_replicas": 0 # Restore with no replicas initially
  "index.auto_expand_replicas": "false" # Disable auto-expansion of replicas
  "index.blocks.write": null # Ensure write blocks are removed (if present in snapshot)
ignore_index_settings: # Optional: Do not restore specific index settings
  - "index.refresh_interval"
  - "index.search.idle.after"
  - "index.max_ngram_diff"
